assignments_target_check.name: assignments_target_check
assignments_target_check.value:
("assignments"."target_type" = 'branch' and "assignments"."target_branch_id" is not null and "assignments"."target_enrollment_id" is null)
        or ("assignments"."target_type" = 'student' and "assignments"."target_enrollment_id" is not null and "assignments"."target_branch_id" is null)

enrollment_drafts_private_lesson_fields_.name: enrollment_drafts_private_lesson_fields_check
enrollment_drafts_private_lesson_fields_.value:
"enrollment_drafts"."course_mode" <> 'private'
        or "enrollment_drafts"."program_id" is null
        or (
          "enrollment_drafts"."selected_instructor_profile_id" is not null
          and "enrollment_drafts"."private_lesson_language" is not null
          and "enrollment_drafts"."private_lesson_hours" > 0
          and "enrollment_drafts"."private_lesson_rate_id" is not null
        )

enrollment_drafts_capacity_override_chec.name: enrollment_drafts_capacity_override_check
enrollment_drafts_capacity_override_chec.value:
"enrollment_drafts"."capacity_override" = false
        or (
          "enrollment_drafts"."branch_id" is not null
          and "enrollment_drafts"."capacity_override_by_user_id" is not null
          and "enrollment_drafts"."capacity_override_at" is not null
        )

enrollments_capacity_override_check.name: enrollments_capacity_override_check
enrollments_capacity_override_check.value:
"enrollments"."capacity_override" = false
        or (
          "enrollments"."branch_id" is not null
          and "enrollments"."capacity_override_by_user_id" is not null
          and "enrollments"."capacity_override_at" is not null
        )

commission_rates_scope_check.name: commission_rates_scope_check
commission_rates_scope_check.value:
("commission_rates"."scope" = 'branch' and "commission_rates"."branch_id" is not null and "commission_rates"."instructor_id" is null)
        or ("commission_rates"."scope" = 'instructor_private' and "commission_rates"."instructor_id" is not null and "commission_rates"."branch_id" is null)

payment_records_amounts_check.name: payment_records_amounts_check
payment_records_amounts_check.value:
("payment_records"."declared_amount_cents" is null or "payment_records"."declared_amount_cents" >= 0)
        and ("payment_records"."amount_cents" is null or "payment_records"."amount_cents" > 0)
        and ("payment_records"."zumra_share_cents" is null or "payment_records"."zumra_share_cents" >= 0)
        and ("payment_records"."teacher_share_basis_points" is null
          or ("payment_records"."teacher_share_basis_points" >= 0 and "payment_records"."teacher_share_basis_points" <= 10000))

payment_records_confirmed_check.name: payment_records_confirmed_check
payment_records_confirmed_check.value:
"payment_records"."status" <> 'confirmed'
        or ("payment_records"."amount_cents" is not null and "payment_records"."reviewed_by_user_id" is not null)

programs_group_fields_check.name: programs_group_fields_check
programs_group_fields_check.value:
"programs"."kind" <> 'group'
        or (
          "programs"."language" is not null
          and "programs"."list_price_cents" is not null
          and jsonb_array_length("programs"."levels") >= 1
        )

lesson_session_meetings_ready_check.name: lesson_session_meetings_ready_check
lesson_session_meetings_ready_check.value:
"lesson_session_meetings"."status" <> 'ready'
        or (
          "lesson_session_meetings"."space_name" is not null
          and "lesson_session_meetings"."meeting_uri" is not null
          and "lesson_session_meetings"."meeting_code" is not null
        )

lesson_sessions_target_check.name: lesson_sessions_target_check
lesson_sessions_target_check.value:
("lesson_sessions"."source" = 'branch' and "lesson_sessions"."branch_id" is not null)
        or ("lesson_sessions"."source" = 'private' and "lesson_sessions"."enrollment_id" is not null)
